eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Travis, TX; at 05:44 PM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 06:44 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Travis County Sheriff Office: POLICE ACTIVITY in Manor, TX between US290, Old Kimbro Rd, Bois-D-Arc Rd, Gregg Manor Rd has ended.

Oficina del Alguacil del Condado de Travis: La actividad policial en Manor, TX - entre la US290, Old Kimbro Rd, Bois-D-Arc Rd y Gregg Manor Rd - ha cesado.
